name: lab-pdf-gen
description: Synthetic lab-report PDF generator for stress-testing the LabSense agent's watch/dedup/upload pipeline. Produces realistic Indian-style CBC / Lipid / LFT / Thyroid reports across multiple fictitious labs with a configurable patient mix.
author: Ravindra Singh <ravindra@budgurjar.org>

scripts.setup:fonts: mkdir -p assets/fonts && curl -fsSL -o assets/fonts/NotoSansDevanagari-Regular.ttf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/notofonts/notofonts.github.io/main/fonts/NotoSansDevanagari/unhinted/ttf/NotoSansDevanagari-Regular.ttf && curl -fsSL -o assets/fonts/NotoSansDevanagari-Bold.ttf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/notofonts/notofonts.github.io/main/fonts/NotoSansDevanagari/unhinted/ttf/NotoSansDevanagari-Bold.ttf && curl -fsSL -o assets/fonts/OFL.txt https://raw.githubusercontent.com/notofonts/devanagari/main/OFL.txt
